issues.title: Network commands fail intermittently; need auto-retry
issues.body: install and fetch occasionally fail with ECONNRESET on flaky wifi. Please add automatic retries with backoff.

issues.title: Progress bar stalls on large imports
issues.body: Under v1.4.2 the spinner freezes at 99% for ~30s but the operation completes. Cosmetic but confusing.

issues.title: Docs: mismatch between help text and README
issues.body: README says --force defaults to false; --help shows true. Which is correct?

user_notes.note: We saw 10-15% transient failures on CI with v1.4.2. Automatic retry would help stabilize nightly jobs.
The colorized logs in 1.4.2 are great. Would love a --retry flag for fetch/install on poor hotel wifi.
